items.title: Trump says he asked Xi not to give Iran weapons
items.summary: I wrote ​him a letter asking him not to ⁠do that, and he wrote me a letter saying ‌that, essentially, he’s not doing that, says U.S. President Donald Trump

items.title: Kanye West Postpones Concert in France as Government Considers Banning It
items.summary: The rapper formerly known as Kanye West had been scheduled to perform in Marseille, France, in June. The city’s mayor had said he did not want it to be “a showcase for those who...

items.title: Trump says new talks with Iran will happen soon. And, Eric Swalwell faces new allegations
items.summary: President Trump says new talks with Iran could happen in the next two days. And, Democrat Eric Swalwell faces new allegations as a second woman comes forward accusing him of rape.
